title: Federal Funding — HBCU / Minority Serving Institution (MSI) Programs
content:
Morgan State University, as an R2 HBCU, is eligible for and strongly encouraged to pursue HBCU/MSI-targeted federal funding programs. The ORA Funding Sources page lists the following programs by agency:

DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DoD):
- DoD Research and Education Program for HBCU/MSI — https://www.grants.gov/web/grants/view-opportunity.html?oppId=316548
- Air Force Research Lab Minority Leaders – Research Collaboration Program — https://afresearchlab.com/lab-life/minority-leaders-research-collaboration-program/
- Army Research Lab HBCU/MI Opportunities — https://www.arl.army.mil/collaborate-with-us/audience/hbcu-mi/
- Office of Naval Research HBCU/MI Faculty Start-up Program in Materials — https://www.nre.navy.mil/organization/departments/code-33/division-332/hbcu-faculty-start-up-materials
- Naval Research Laboratory HBCU/MI Undergraduate Internship Program — https://www.nrl.navy.mil/Careers/Students/HBCU-MI-Research-Internship-Program/

DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION (DoED):
- DoED Strengthening HBCUs Division — https://www2.ed.gov/programs/idueshbgi/index.html
- DoED Minority Science and Engineering Improvement Program (MSEIP) — https://www2.ed.gov/programs/iduesmsi/index.html
- DoED Research Training Programs in the Education Sciences — https://ies.ed.gov/funding/ncer_rfas/training.asp

DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY (DOE):
- DoE NNSA Minority Serving Institution Partnership Program — https://www.energy.gov/nnsa/nnsa-minority-serving-institution-partnership-program
- DoE Minority Educational Institution Student Partnership Program (MEISPP) — https://www.energy.gov/diversity/minority-educational-institution-student-partnership-program-meispp-internships

DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY (DHS):
- DHS Office of University Programs — Minority Serving Institutions Program — https://www.dhs.gov/science-and-technology/minority-serving-institutions-program

DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION (DoT):
- DoT FAA Minority-Serving Institution Intern Program — https://www.faa.gov/jobs/students/internships/minority/
- DoT FHWA Summer Transportation Internship Program — https://www.fhwa.dot.gov/careers/stipdg.cfm

NASA:
- NASA Office of Small Business Programs (OSBP) HBCUs/MSIs — https://www.nasa.gov/osbp
- NASA Minority University Research and Education Programs (MUREP) Small Projects — https://www.nasa.gov/stem/murep/home/index.html

NATIONAL ENDOWMENT FOR THE HUMANITIES (NEH):
- NEH Humanities Initiatives at HSIs/HBCUs/TCUs — https://www.neh.gov/grants/education/humanities-initiatives-historically-black-colleges-and-universities
- NEH Awards for Faculty at HSIs/HBCUs/TCUs — https://www.neh.gov/grants/research/awards-faculty-historically-black-colleges-and-universities

NATIONAL INSTITUTES OF HEALTH (NIH):
- NIH NIGMS Support for Research Excellence (SuRE) — https://nigms.nih.gov/about/overview/Pages/SuRE.aspx
- NIH NIGMS Research Enhancement Award (R15) — https://grants.nih.gov/grants/funding/r15.htm
- NIH NIGMS Undergraduate and Predoctoral Cross-Disciplinary Training programs — https://www.nigms.nih.gov/training/Pages/TWDPrograms.aspx
- NIH NIMHD Research Centers in Minority Institutions Program (RCMI) — https://www.nimhd.nih.gov/programs/extramural/research-centers/rcmi/
- NIH NIMHD Structured Institutional Needs Assessment and Action Plan Development for MSIs — https://www.nimhd.nih.gov/funding/approved-concepts/2022/structured-institutional-needs-assessment-msis.html
- NIH NCI Continuing Umbrella of Research Experiences (CURE) — https://www.cancer.gov/about-nci/organization/crchd/diversity-training/cure

NATIONAL PARK SERVICE (NPS):
- NPS Historic Preservation Fund (HBCU grants) — https://www.nps.gov/subjects/historicpreservationfund/hbcu-grant-info.htm

NATIONAL SCIENCE FOUNDATION (NSF):
- NSF HBCU-Undergraduate Program (HBCU-UP) — https://beta.nsf.gov/funding/opportunities/historically-black-colleges-and-universities-undergraduate-program-hbcu
- NSF Excellence in Research (HBCU-EiR) — https://beta.nsf.gov/funding/opportunities/historically-black-colleges-and-universities-excellence-research-hbcu-eir
- NSF Centers of Research Excellence in Science and Technology (CREST) — https://beta.nsf.gov/funding/opportunities/centers-research-excellence-science-technology-0
- NSF Partnerships for Research and Education in Materials (PREM) — http://www.nsf.gov/funding/pgm_summ.jsp?pims_id=5439
- NSF Mid-Career Advancement (MCA) — https://www.nsf.gov/funding/pgm_summ.jsp?pims_id=505749
- NSF INCLUDES — https://www.nsf.gov/funding/pgm_summ.jsp?pims_id=505289
- NSF Louis Stokes Alliances for Minority Participation (LSAMP) — http://www.nsf.gov/funding/pgm_summ.jsp?pims_id=13646
- NSF S-STEM (Scholarships in STEM) — http://www.nsf.gov/funding/pgm_summ.jsp?pims_id=5257
- NSF IUSE:GEOPaths (Pathways into Geoscience) — http://www.nsf.gov/funding/pgm_summ.jsp?pims_id=505169
